checks.description: Conservative guardrail ensuring that repeated toggles of wave_out are observable without assuming fixed latency.
notes: The property does not require a specific cycle count between toggles, only that a change is eventually seen.
checks.pass_condition: After each legal operation, wave_out must eventually change state at least once before the next operation is applied.
checks.trigger_condition: When a back-to-back sequence of legal operations is issued.

checks.pass_condition: wave_out must transition at least once after a single legal freq stimulus is applied, without assuming a fixed cycle latency.
checks.trigger_condition: When the basic_001 case applies a legal freq value.
